step: DP1-REOPEN Part 1 — INGEST N-PORT, build the RESIDENCE cell that CAN be built
what_this_is: A quarterly panel of U.S.-registered-fund holdings whose issuer INVESTMENT_COUNTRY (Form N-PORT item C.5.a, the issuer's country of ORGANIZATION = RESIDENCE) is in the haven set {KY Cayman, HK Hong Kong, VG British Virgin Islands} or is CN (China mainland, resident-issued). Despite the filename it is RESIDENCE-resolved, with an explicit UNDETERMINED nationality column.

basis_statement.geographic_basis: RESIDENCE (issuer country of organization). The ONLY geographic field on an N-PORT holding is INVESTMENT_COUNTRY (item C.5.a), defined verbatim by the SEC data dictionary as 'the ISO country code that corresponds to the country where the issuer is organized' (domicile/residence), NOT ultimate-parent nationality. Confirmed in build/contracts/nport_gcap_contract.json (structure.residence_vs_nationality).
basis_statement.iso_code_form: N-PORT C.5.a uses ISO-3166 alpha-2 codes (verified in the as-filed data: distinct values include US, JP, GB, KY, CN, HK, VG, ...). The DP1-REOPEN task named the targets in alpha-3 (CYM/HKG/VGB/CHN); the alpha-2 -> alpha-3 mapping applied is {KY->CYM, HK->HKG, VG->VGB, CN->CHN}. Column investment_country holds the as-filed alpha-2; investment_country_iso3 echoes the alpha-3.

NATIONALITY_IS_UNDETERMINED_HOLE.why: The NATIONALITY (haven -> ultimate-parent, i.e. haven -> China) reattribution is a COMMERCIALLY-GATED HOLE. It is NOT in N-PORT and is obtainable only via the GCAP/CMNS ultimate-parent crosswalk, whose code is public but which requires LICENSED, NON-REDISTRIBUTED commercial ownership databases: CUSIP Global Services (CGS), Dealogic, SDC, S&P Capital IQ, Bureau van Dijk ORBIS, FactSet, Morningstar (plus an OpenFIGI/Bloomberg API key for CUSIP->FIGI). Per build/contracts/nport_gcap_contract.json (Part 0 grounded determination: structure.crosswalk_determination, determination, known_frictions). This column is NOT filled and was NOT approximated or guessed. The residence-haven subset is NOT the China-nationality cell; conflating them would be a substitution this build explicitly guards against.
NATIONALITY_IS_UNDETERMINED_HOLE.contract_determination_quote: RESIDUAL HOLE (NOT overturned). N-PORT makes U.S.-fund holdings PUBLICLY CONSTRUCTIBLE on a RESIDENCE basis ... BUT the discriminating cell requires NATIONALITY (haven->China ultimate-parent) reattribution, and NO reproducible PUBLIC crosswalk exists.
NATIONALITY_IS_UNDETERMINED_HOLE.illustration: Spot-check row: Alibaba Group Holding Ltd appears with investment_country=KY (Cayman, its country of organization). Its CHINA nationality is precisely what the gated CMNS crosswalk would assign and is exactly what this panel leaves UNDETERMINED rather than fabricate.

SCOPE_LIMIT.holder_universe: U.S.-REGISTERED-FUND HOLDERS ONLY (open-end funds and other registered investment companies filing Form N-PORT; excludes money-market funds / UIT-organized ETFs per N-PORT scope, and excludes banks, insurers, pensions, and direct/official holders). This is the operator's dense US-holder leg, NOT the global holder matrix; non-US holder legs are OUT OF SCOPE.
SCOPE_LIMIT.frequency: Effectively QUARTERLY on each fund's FISCAL-quarter-end. Only the third-month-of-fiscal-quarter N-PORT report is ever public (SEC press release 2019-23); the first two months are permanently withheld.

COVERAGE_SUBSET_DISCLOSURE.claimed_range: NOT 2019Q4-2024Q4 continuous. A DOCUMENTED TRACTABLE SUBSET of 8 fiscal quarters was built (the full 21-quarter range was not downloaded in this run; each quarterly ZIP is 240-724 MB and FUND_REPORTED_HOLDING.tsv alone is ~0.5-1 GB uncompressed per quarter).
COVERAGE_SUBSET_DISCLOSURE.selection_rationale: Spread across the period: coverage start (2019Q3/Q4), the COVID-onset run (2020Q1-Q3), the sanctions episode (2022Q1-Q2), and the latest available (2024Q4). N-PORT public-data convention (GCAP C_nport_build.py): the ZIP labelled <YYYY>qQ contains filings disseminated in that quarter whose holdings are as-of the PREVIOUS fiscal quarter-end; both labels are recorded per row (zip_quarter, fiscal_quarter) and the authoritative as-of date is the filing's REPORT_DATE.
COVERAGE_SUBSET_DISCLOSURE.quarters_skipped_and_why: All fiscal quarters between 2020q3 and 2022q1, between 2022q2 and 2024q4, and 2024q1-q3 were NOT built. Reason: download/parse cost of the full 21-quarter range was infeasible within this run; the 8 quarters built are the documented maximal-spread tractable subset and are sufficient to demonstrate the residence cell is constructible and traceable. No silent truncation: this is explicitly a subset, not the full range.

totals.haven_resident_note: is_haven_resident=True marks RESIDENCE in CYM/HKG/VGB. This is residence, NOT parent-nationality; it does NOT identify China-parent issuers.

IDENTIFIER_COVERAGE_CHECK.definition: Share of built panel rows carrying a usable ISIN (12 alphanumeric) OR usable CUSIP (9 alphanumeric).
IDENTIFIER_COVERAGE_CHECK.reported_actual_not_asserted: This is the measured value on the rows actually built, not an assumed figure.

ACCESSION_TRACEABILITY_SPOTCHECKS.method: Each panel row carries a real accession_number + holding_id. Three accession numbers were resolved live against SEC EDGAR archives on 2026-06-29.

checks.issuer_example: China Cinda Asset Management (residence CN, ISIN CNE100001QS1)
Alibaba Group Holding Ltd (residence KY, China-parent UNDETERMINED here)

ACCESSION_TRACEABILITY_SPOTCHECKS.result: All three accession numbers resolve to live EDGAR filing-index directories (HTTP 200); the first is confirmed NPORT-P with primary_doc.xml present and the CIK's filing type is NPORT-P.

value_basis_caveat: currency_value (item C.2.c) is reported with currency_code (C.2.b). Per the Part-0 contract, USD denomination of currency_value is the N-PORT standard but was NOT confirmed from the primary form-instruction text (SEC instruction PDF returned 403 in the Part-0 pass); currency_code is retained per row so the denomination is auditable.

sources.gcap_pipeline_followed: github.com/global-capital-allocation-project/public-US-funds-data (table/column names and the zip-quarter -> previous-fiscal-quarter convention follow B_processing_functions_nport.py and C_nport_build.py)
sources.user_agent_used: dollar-breaking-point research milevsky@hotmail.com (descriptive UA with contact email, per SEC EDGAR requirement)

integrity_notes: Built ONLY from actual fetched SEC filings; every row traces to a real accession_number (spot-checked against EDGAR). The nationality crosswalk was NOT fabricated or approximated — issuer_nationality is uniformly UNDETERMINED-NO-PUBLIC-CROSSWALK. The residence-haven subset is NOT presented as the China-nationality cell. Identifier coverage is the measured 99.33%, not an asserted figure. No contracts, build/model, build/results, or prior verdict/audit files were modified; DP2/DP3/DP6 were not started.
